description_long: This object is a large, robust machine gun mounted on a heavy cylindrical pedestal, likely designed for emplacement use. The main body is constructed from dark metal, featuring a thick, cylindrical barrel with reinforced housing and several mechanical components along its length. The mounting base is wide and stable, with visible adjustment levers and brackets for aiming and securing the weapon. The receiver area is complex, with multiple knobs, handles, and what appears to be a loading or ejection port, but no visible magazine or belt feed. The surface is matte and slightly rough, showing signs of wear and utilitarian design, with no decorative elements. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and sustained fire, suitable for defensive or vehicle-mounted roles in urban environments.
description: A heavy, dark metal machine gun mounted on a sturdy cylindrical base, featuring a thick barrel and multiple adjustment levers and handles. The design is utilitarian, with a matte, slightly rough finish and no visible magazine.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the thick barrel opening, adjustment levers, and the complex receiver area with visible handles and knobs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mounting base, side brackets, and the absence of a visible magazine or feed system.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back of the receiver, mounting hardware, and the solid, cylindrical support base.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the barrel housing, adjustment mechanisms, and the robust construction of the mounting system.
attribute_barrel_type: thick cylindrical barrel with reinforced housing, no visible cooling fins or perforations
attribute_mounting_mechanism: heavy cylindrical pedestal mount with adjustment levers and brackets
